svg.title: AI Intelligence Graph: Knowledge Map + Skill-Kit (2 in 1)
svg.desc: A dual-layer diagram showing Knowledge Map (what the AI knows) on top and Skill-Kit (what the AI can do) on bottom, connected by a central AI core node.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is a domain knowledge node in an AI knowledge graph?')
sendPrompt('How does an AI represent concepts in a knowledge graph?')
sendPrompt('What are relationships in an AI knowledge graph?')
sendPrompt('How does context awareness work in a knowledge graph?')
sendPrompt('What is episodic memory in AI?')
sendPrompt('What is semantic memory in AI?')
sendPrompt('What is procedural memory in AI?')
sendPrompt('What is meta-knowledge in AI systems?')
sendPrompt('What is an AI core that connects knowledge and skills?')
sendPrompt('What is a code generation skill in an AI skill-kit?')
sendPrompt('How does tool use work as an AI skill?')
sendPrompt('What is planning and reasoning as an AI skill?')
sendPrompt('How does retrieval work as an AI skill?')
sendPrompt('What is summarisation as an AI skill?')
sendPrompt('What is multimodal understanding in AI?')
sendPrompt('How does an AI critique and evaluate its own output?')
sendPrompt('What is memory management as an AI skill?')
sendPrompt('What does an AI output after using its knowledge graph and skill-kit?')
